resource_role: PubMed, Gene, GEO, SRA, Protein, PMC, and other Entrez metadata

evidence_boundary.can_support: Traceable Entrez record search and public metadata retrieval planning.
evidence_boundary.cannot_support: Full-paper evidence, mechanism, causality, clinical efficacy, or absence-of-evidence claims.
evidence_boundary.privacy_or_access: Public metadata request only. Do not submit private manuscript text, patient data, PHI, or unpublished data.
evidence_boundary.handoff: Use this packet as Reef resource evidence for Iceberg, Anchor, or Compass. Do not treat it as primary experimental validation.
